name: vuln-analysis
description: Automated security vulnerability verification and exploitation pipeline for Claude Code

metadata.description: A Claude plugin that automates the full vulnerability analysis lifecycle: target extraction, Docker environment setup, vulnerability scanning with 3-phase false positive filtering, PoC script generation, containerized reproduction with anti-cheat validation, retry loops, and comprehensive Markdown/JSON report delivery. Supports 6 vulnerability types: RCE, SSRF, insecure deserialization, arbitrary file R/W, DoS, and command injection.
